negative_prompt: The video captures a series of frames showing ugly scenes, static with no motion, motion blur, over-saturation, shaky footage, low resolution, grainy texture, pixelated images, poorly lit areas, underexposed and overexposed scenes, poor color balance, washed out colors, choppy sequences, jerky movements, low frame rate, artifacting, color banding, unnatural transitions, outdated special effects, fake elements, unconvincing visuals, poorly edited content, jump cuts, visual noise, and flickering. Overall, the video is of poor quality.
name: av_99ed9edb-10f2-40a8-bb51-71c744632b89
prompt: The video opens with a view from inside a vehicle stopped at a red traffic light at an urban intersection. The scene is set under a clear blue sky with the sun shining brightly, casting a warm glow over the surroundings. The traffic light is red, indicating that vehicles must stop. Across the intersection, a multi-story building with a mix of red and white facades stands prominently. A pedestrian crossing sign is visible on the right side of the road, near a patch of dry grass and dirt, along with a "right lane ends" sign in rhombus shape. In the background, other buildings and a bridge structure can be seen, suggesting this is a busy city area. Several cars are waiting to proceed through the intersection, including a white truck and a dark-colored sedan. As the video progresses, the ego vehicle slowly approaches the intersection, yielding to other vehicles passing from the left side of the frame to the right. The scene remains consistent with the urban setting, featuring the same multi-story building, trees, and pedestrian crossing sign, while the movement of the cars adds dynamic activity to the otherwise static environment. By the end of the video, the ego vehicle moves over the pedestrian crossing marking at the right turn junction on the road, and the intersection is still active with vehicles moving in both directions, maintaining the bustling urban atmosphere. A medium shot from a slightly elevated perspective captures the entire scene.
